name: Deemerr
description: Deemerr is an advanced, multi-skill AI agent native to the Billions Network. Equipped with on-chain analytics, NFT tracking, validator stats, and DEX routing to optimize your DeFi strategy.

skills.name: Billions Gas Tracker
skills.description: Provides real-time gas fees for the Billions Network Mainnet.

skills.name: $BILL Price Tracker
skills.description: Fetches the real-time market price of the Billions Network native token ($BILL).

skills.name: Wallet Balance Checker
skills.description: Checks the token balance of any wallet address on the Billions Network.

skills.name: Transaction Scanner
skills.description: Reads and verifies on-chain transaction statuses using the Billions block explorer.

skills.name: Yield & Staking Monitor
skills.description: Tracks the best APY rates for staking and yield farming on Billions Network DeFi protocols.

skills.name: Bridge Assistant
skills.description: Guides users on how to safely bridge assets over to the Billions Network.

skills.name: Billions NFT Tracker
skills.description: Monitors trending NFT collections and floor prices on the Billions Network.

skills.name: DEX Swap Router
skills.description: Finds the most efficient token swap routes across Billions Network decentralized exchanges.

skills.name: Validator Node Stats
skills.description: Tracks uptime, commission rates, and total staked $BILL for active network validators.
